rows.need: bind references to attached artifacts instead of assuming inline content
rows.title: Attachment Reference Lens

rows.need: ground whether a training curve plateaued, improved, or oscillated
rows.title: Plateau / Trend Lens

rows.need: mark transcript uncertainty before committing quoted speech
rows.title: Transcript Uncertainty Lens

rows.need: attach measurement uncertainty to numeric observations before comparison
rows.title: Measurement Error Lens

rows.need: separate suggested tool use from actually executed tool output
rows.title: Tool Recommendation / Execution Lens

rows.need: connect mutation/search difficulty to the size of the explored space
rows.title: Search Space / Cost Lens

rows.need: separate hard requirements from soft recommendations
rows.title: Must / Should Distinction Lens

rows.need: bind state claims to local or remote context before sync decisions
rows.title: Local / Remote State Lens

rows.need: require consent context before exposing or reusing private information
rows.title: Privacy / Consent Guard

rows.need: extract error stack frame order before identifying the failing layer
rows.title: Stack Frame Lens

rows.need: bind ablation/control outcomes to the system variant being tested
rows.title: Ablation / Control Result Lens

rows.need: require concrete evidence before accepting a completion state
rows.title: Done / Evidence Lens

rows.need: separate stable machine identity from human aliases and descriptors
rows.title: Registry UID / Alias Lens

rows.need: ground file and code claims to the referenced line context
rows.title: Line Reference Lens

rows.need: bind routing cost to the active candidate set rather than full library size
rows.title: Active Set Filter Lens

rows.need: preserve exceptions without dropping the underlying prohibition
rows.title: Prohibition / Exception Guard
